---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you are running into. What are you trying to do that FinderPath currently makes difficult?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like FinderPath to do. Be as specific as possible — menu item name, settings option, keyboard shortcut, etc.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds you have tried, or other approaches you considered and why they did not fit.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references to similar utilities, or anything else that would help clarify the request.
